title: Ghast Pedal!
description: Adds the ability to sprint while riding on a Happy Ghast, giving it a modest boost.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/XnFLY-PFtn0" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Ghast Pedal: Sprint on your Happy Ghast!

Do you think Happy Ghasts are a little bit too slow? Well this pack's just for you, now they can be slightly less slow!

- Just like Camels, you can use your sprint key on the Happy Ghast to speed them up!
- While sprinting, Happy Ghasts fly 30% faster, the same percentage boost as a player's sprint!
- The player's FOV is appropriately altered while sprinting is active, matching vanilla behavior!

Note: You need to activate sprint using the sprint key, which means simply pressing the forward key twice doesn't work.
